## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- The actual use case. "I want X" is less useful than "I'm trying to
     do Y and X would let me." -->

## What's the proposed solution?

<!-- Sketch the API, behaviour, or output shape. Code examples are
     very welcome — even pseudo-code is enough. -->

```python
# Example of how the feature would be used:
```

## What alternatives have you considered?

<!-- Workarounds you've tried, library/code patterns you've seen
     elsewhere, why none of them are sufficient. -->

## Which architectural layer does this touch?

- [ ] Schema (`siphyy.schema`) — canonical event types
- [ ] Adapters (`siphyy.adapters`) — provider-to-canonical translation
- [ ] Detectors (`siphyy.detectors`) — Tier 1, rule-based
- [ ] Agents (`siphyy.agents`) — Tier 2, LLM-grounded
- [ ] Knowledge / case base (`siphyy.knowledge`)
- [ ] Demo app (`apps/demo`)
- [ ] Docs / packaging / CI
- [ ] Not sure — happy to discuss

## Additional context

<!-- Links to similar features in other projects, screenshots, diagrams,
     a Linear / GitHub issue number if there's a related one. -->
